highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.0 rebases on Skia milestone 119 and adds LoongArch64, riscv64, Alpine and Windows-ARM builds.
highlights_body: It also lands Direct3D on Windows, tvOS Metal support, SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec, the missing color-filter types, and a stack of Metal, Blazor and .NET Framework fixes.

bullets.detail: The bundled engine moves through m117 and m118 to Chrome/Skia m119, picking up the corresponding rendering, text and codec fixes.
Updates libpng to 1.6.44, HarfBuzz to 8.3.1 and vulkanmemoryallocator to 3.2.1.

bullets.lead: SaveLayerRec, missing color filters and Metal render targets
bullets.detail: Implements SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec, exposes the previously missing SKColorFilter types, and lands the Metal GRBackendRenderTarget APIs on every Apple platform.
SKImage.FromPicture now renders correctly again after a regression in the picture handling code.
Fixes iOS Simulator performance on the Metal backend and adds SKMetalView support on tvOS.
Restores compatibility with .NET Framework and Mono projects that consume SkiaSharp via packages.config.

bullets.lead: New architectures — LoongArch64, riscv64, Alpine, Windows ARM
bullets.detail: Adds native builds for LoongArch64 and riscv64 Linux, extends the clang cross-toolchain to Alpine, and turns on GL on Windows ARM. Fixes ARM machine targets in the process.
Compiles Skia with Direct3D on the Windows platform so consumers can opt into the D3D backend.
Rebuilds the Android natives with NDK r27c and 16 KB page-size alignment to keep working on newer Android devices.
Picks up the fix for CVE-2024-30105 in the build so shipped packages are no longer exposed.

contributor_summaries.kasperk81: Enabled riscv64 builds, extended the clang cross toolchain to Alpine, bumped vulkanmemoryallocator and fixed the Linux tests
contributor_summaries.Kation: Added Direct3D compilation of Skia on Windows
contributor_summaries.kkwpsv: Fixed an incorrect call in the bindings
contributor_summaries.spouliot: Added Metal GRBackendRenderTarget APIs to every Apple platform
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Fixed the regression breaking .NET Framework/Mono projects using packages.config
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed iOS Simulator performance on the Metal backend

preview_summaries.p1: 3.119.0 Preview 1 landed the m119 rebase, the new architectures and the Direct3D-on-Windows work; earlier 3.118 previews carried the initial Skia rebases and codec updates.
preview_summaries.p2: The 3.118 Preview 2 lineage fed forward the Blazor and WinUI fixes plus the Metal GRBackendRenderTarget APIs that now ship as part of 3.119.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.1 tracks HarfBuzz 8.3.1 and picks up the new-architecture packaging (LoongArch64, riscv64, Alpine, Windows-ARM, Android NDK r27c).
